lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਣੁ ਮਾਣੁ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਟੇਕ ॥੪॥੨॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: taan maan deebaan saachaa naanak kee prabh ttek |4|2|20|
lines.english: The True Lord is Nanak's strength, honor and support; He alone is his protection. ||4||2||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਸਗਲ ਬਿਧਿ ਕਾਂਮਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aan sagal bidh kaam na aavai har har naam dhiaaeaa |1|
lines.english: All other devices did not work, so I meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਤ ਫਿਰਤ ਭੇਟੇ ਜਨ ਸਾਧੂ ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਸਮਝਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: firat firat bhette jan saadhoo poorai gur samajhaaeaa |
lines.english: Wandering and roaming around, I met the Holy Perfect Guru, who has taught me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਮੋਹਿ ਧਾਰੀ ਓਟ ਗੋਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: taa te mohi dhaaree ott gopaal |
lines.english: For this reason, I sought the Protection and Support of my Lord, the Cherisher of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸਗਲ ਜੰਜਾਲ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saran pario pooran paramesur binase sagal janjaal | rahaau |
lines.english: I sought the Sanctuary of the Perfect Transcendent Lord, and all my entanglements were dissolved. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਉਧਾਰਨ ਸਭ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jeea udhaaran sabh kul taaran har har naam dhiaae |2|
lines.english: To save your soul, and liberate all your ancestors, meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਗ ਮਿਰਤ ਪਇਆਲ ਭੂ ਮੰਡਲ ਸਗਲ ਬਿਆਪੇ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: surag mirat peaal bhoo manddal sagal biaape maae |
lines.english: Paradise, the earth, the nether regions of the underworld, and the globe of the world - all are engrossed in Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਬਿਰਲੇ ਕਾਹੂ ਜਾਨਾ ॥੩॥੩॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa jis dee suaamee birale kaahoo jaanaa |3|3|21|
lines.english: Only that rare person, whom the Lord and Master blesses with His Grace, comes to know this. ||3||3||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਗਾਈਐ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਰਬ ਨਿਧਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: naanak naam niranjan gaaeeai paaeeai sarab nidhaanaa |
lines.english: O Nanak, singing the Naam, the Name of the Immaculate Lord, all treasures are obtained.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Chau-Padhay:
You shall have to abandon the straw which you have collected.
You think that your enemies are friends. ||1||
These entanglements shall be of no use to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਚਾਲਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਸਿਉ ਹੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: sang na chaaleh tin siau heet |
lines.english: You are in love with those things that will not go with you.
He does not like to see Truth and righteousness.
In such confusion, the world has gone astray.
The foolish mortal wastes this precious human life. ||Pause||
The wretched creature does not even think of death. ||2||
He is attached to falsehood and deception; they seem sweet to him.
He loves gifts, but he forgets the Giver.
He does not understand the Hukam of the Lord's Command, and so he continues coming and going in reincarnation.
He cries for the possessions of others.
He forfeits all the merits of his good deeds and religion.
He sins, and then regrets and repents. ||3||
Poor Nanak is Your slave, Your humble servant.
I am a sacrifice to Your Will.
Whatever pleases You, Lord, that alone is acceptable.
Save me, O my Lord God Master! ||4||1||22||
I am meek and poor; the Name of God is my only Support.
Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤਿ ਪਲਤਿ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਆਵੈ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: halat palat taa kai aavai kaam |1|
lines.english: It is useful in both this world and the next. ||1||
The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is my occupation and earnings.
I gather only the Lord's Name.
Imbued with the Love of the Lord God's Infinite Name,
The Glory of the Holy Saints comes from their total humility.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਏਕ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadh gaaveh gun ek nirankaar | rahaau |
lines.english: the Holy Saints sing the Glorious Praises of the One Lord, the Formless Lord. ||Pause||
Meditating on the Lord of the Universe, the Saints are in bliss.
The Saints find peace, and their anxieties are dispelled. ||2||
The Saints realize that their greatness rests in the Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਨਾਦ ਕਵਿਤ ॥
lines.translit: teh har jas gaaveh naad kavit |
lines.english: there they sing the Praises of the Lord, in music and poetry.
Wherever the Holy Saints gather,
In the Society of the Saints, there is bliss and peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨ ਸੰਗੁ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਕਰਾਮ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aun sang so paae jis masatak karaam |3|
lines.english: They alone obtain this Society, upon whose foreheads such destiny is written. ||3||
With my palms pressed together, I offer my prayer.
I wash their feet, and chant the Praises of the Lord, the treasure of virtue.
Nanak lives, in the dust of the Saints. ||4||2||23||
O God, merciful and compassionate, let me remain in Your Presence.
